text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of Mayano Top Gun's debut has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Look at me, Trainer! I'm not wearing a tracksuit
today!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Bingo! You get a gold star and an A++ from me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You know what that means, right? You gotta
keep your eyes on me! Got it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you just how brightly I can sparkle in the
Twinkle Series! ♪
